decision_summary: Approve v6.1 Work Governance Integration as the next AOF frontier.
rationale: The plan advances AOF from public runtime readiness toward cross-domain work governance while preserving Need Validation, Skillful Actor contracts, Mission Control projection boundaries, and phased implementation discipline.
recommendation: Treat TASK-057 planning as complete after verification, then open the next bounded implementation task for schemas and fixtures.
expected_user_reaction: Understand that v6.1 is about governing work items across domains, not adding PMO-only dashboards or uncontrolled automation.
artifact_change_recommendations: Add schemas and fixtures next: work-item-goal, actor-composition, council-ready-output, go-no-go-visualization, operational-map-change-log, context-pack, and external-ref.
organization_change_recommendations: Keep Visionary, Builder, and Guardian mandatory, and add specialized roles through actor composition rather than replacing the core council.
